body:
﻿Codex review: NEEDS_CORRECTION.

The implementation and gates are otherwise sound, but two changed comments still describe the rejected TASK timing rather than the implemented top-of-frame timing.

Finding:
- `crates/editor-shell/Cargo.toml:33-35` says the shell drains `MenuCommandHandoff` after `EguiHost::render`.
- `crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/mod.rs:669-672` says the field is drained each frame after `EguiHost::render`.

The EXEC and `render_path.rs` correctly document the actual behavior: commands are drained at the top of `render_frame`, processing commands queued during the previous frame, before frame borrows are taken. Please update those two comments to match. No code behavior changes requested.

Verification already re-run locally on `be3c901`:
- `cargo test -p rge-editor-shell menu_ --lib -- --nocapture` passed 4/4.
- `cargo run -p rge-tool-architecture-lints -- forbidden-dep` passed 0 violations.
- `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1` with `RUST_TEST_THREADS=2` exited 0.
- Live PR checks are all green.

Durable review packet filed: `ai_handoffs/MENUBAR-FILE-WIRING_REVIEW_2026-06-02_00-44-07+0300.md`.

﻿Codex review round 2: APPROVED for closeout.

Reviewed corrected commit `a0ea8eb` for MENUBAR-FILE-WIRING. The prior finding is fixed: the two stale comments now describe the implemented top-of-`render_frame` drain timing, and the old `after EguiHost::render` timing claim is gone from source.

Verification re-run locally from the existing branch worktree at `a0ea8eb`:
- `cargo test -p rge-editor-shell menu_ --lib -- --nocapture` passed 4/4 route tests.
- `cargo run -p rge-tool-architecture-lints -- forbidden-dep` passed 0 violations.
- `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1` with `RUST_TEST_THREADS=2` exited 0; `current_workspace_passes_all_rules` passed, and the 10 architecture lints passed.
- `git diff --check` clean; correction diff is comments-only (`+3/-3` across the two cited files).

Live PR checks: all 13 passed. I also cleaned the known `CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR`-embedding packages from the shared target after my local gate so this review run does not leave another stale-path binary when the branch worktree is later removed.

Durable review packet filed: `ai_handoffs/MENUBAR-FILE-WIRING_REVIEW_2026-06-02_01-17-58+0300.md`.

No remaining correction items. Merge remains gated on explicit human authorization.
